basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Coach Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.total_vacancies: Coach in Athletics, Weight Lifting & Wrestling
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University has released the official Coaches Notification 2026 on 03-07-2026 at https://puchd.ac.in/. A total of 04 vacancies have been announced under the PU Coaches Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates above 21 years of age with a Graduate degree and a One-Year Diploma in Coaching in the respective sport or participation in the Olympic Games/Asian Games/ Commonwealth Games can apply offline from 03-07-2026 to 20-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application form link are available below.

qualification.details: General Eligibility: | Must be a citizen of India. Should not have any criminal record. | Essential Qualifications: | Minimum Educational Qualification: Graduate degree from a recognized University. Coaching Qualification: One Year Diploma in Coaching in the respective game OR Participation in Olympic Games / Asian Games / Commonwealth Games. | Desirable Qualification: | Preferably two years coaching experience in relevant sports. | Age Limit: Must be above 21 years as on 01.04.2026.

how_to_apply: Applications in the Prescribed Proforma are invited.
Download the prescribed application form from the notification.
Fill all details carefully including personal information, educational qualifications, sports achievements, and experience.
Attach attested photocopies of all supporting documents (educational certificates, sports participation certificates, experience letters, etc.).
Submit the complete application so as to reach the Office of Directorate of Sports, Panjab University, Chandigarh by 20-07-2026 (05:00 PM).
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for screening and interview.
important_instructions: Applications received after the last date will not be entertained. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Selected candidates must submit an undertaking that they will not claim regular appointment. Candidates must be physically fit and medically certified for coaching duties. Provide valid email ID and mobile number for all communications.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Directorate of Sports, Panjab University has released notification No. 2895/DS dated 03.07.2026 for engagement of Coaches on contractual basis as per current U.T. DC Rates. The notification includes eligibility criteria, qualifications, terms & conditions, and application details. Download Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: General Eligibility: Must be a citizen of India. Should not have any criminal record. Essential Qualifications: Minimum Educational Qualification: Graduate degree from a recognized University. Coaching Qualification: One Year Diploma in Coaching in the respective game OR Participation in Olympic Games / Asian Games / Commonwealth Games. Desirable Qualification: Preferably two years coaching experience in relevant sports. Age Limit: Must be above 21 years as on 01.04.2026.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications in the Prescribed Proforma are invited. Step-by-Step Application Process: Download the prescribed application form from the notification. Fill all details carefully including personal information, educational qualifications, sports achievements, and experience. Attach attested photocopies of all supporting documents (educational certificates, sports participation certificates, experience letters, etc.). Submit the complete application so as to reach the Office of Directorate of Sports, Panjab University, Chandigarh by 20-07-2026 (05:00 PM). Only shortlisted candidates will be called for screening and interview.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: Applications received after the last date will not be entertained. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Selected candidates must submit an undertaking that they will not claim regular appointment. Candidates must be physically fit and medically certified for coaching duties. Provide valid email ID and mobile number for all communications.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026 General Terms & Conditions
content_sections.text: Duty hours are adjustable as per the needs of the Directorate. The University may depute coaches to affiliated colleges as required. All other terms & conditions as per University rules for contractual employees.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Panjab University Coaches Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 20 July 2026 (05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many Coach vacancies are announced by Panjab University?
faq.answer: Total 04 posts – Athletics (02), Weight Lifting (01), Wrestling (01).

faq.question: Q3. What is the remuneration for Coaches at Panjab University?
faq.answer: Remuneration as per current U.T. DC Rates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for Panjab University Coach post?
faq.answer: Graduate degree + One Year Diploma in Coaching OR participation in Olympic/Asian/Commonwealth Games.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Panjab University Coaches recruitment?
faq.answer: Must be above 21 years as on 01.04.2026.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for Panjab University Athletics / Weight Lifting / Wrestling Coach posts?
faq.answer: Submit the prescribed application form with documents to the Directorate of Sports, Panjab University by 20-07-2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is coaching experience mandatory for Panjab University Coach recruitment?
faq.answer: Two years coaching experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q8. Is the Coach position at Panjab University permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual (initially 89 days, extendable based on performance).

faq.question: Q9. Will there be an interview for Panjab University Coaches selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for screening and interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where to send the application for Panjab University Coaches 2026?
faq.answer: To the Office of Directorate of Sports, Panjab University, Chandigarh.
